title: Revised Rules and Regulations Governing Overseas Employment of Landbased Workers
content: This document contains the Revised Rules and Regulations Governing Overseas Employment of Landbased Workers as promulgated by the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) in June 2002. It serves as the legal framework for the overseas employment of Filipino landbased workers, outlining the rights, obligations, and procedures to be followed by all stakeholders involved in overseas employment.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
